attributes.title: Exercises — Log pipeline (Kibana)
attributes.description: Ingest health for Filebeat → Logstash → Elasticsearch (logstash-* data view).
attributes.panelsJSON: [{"version":"8.15.5","type":"search","gridData":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":24,"h":20,"i":"1"},"panelIndex":"1","embeddableConfig":{"title":"Log pipeline \u2014 all services","description":"All logs shipped through Filebeat \u2192 Logstash","columns":["@timestamp","service","level","message"],"sort":[["@timestamp","desc"]],"kibanaSavedObjectMeta":{"searchSourceJSON":"{\"query\":{\"query\":\"\",\"language\":\"kuery\"},\"filter\":[],\"indexRefName\":\"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index\"}"}}},{"version":"8.15.5","type":"search","gridData":{"x":24,"y":0,"w":24,"h":20,"i":"2"},"panelIndex":"2","embeddableConfig":{"title":"Log pipeline \u2014 errors & warnings","description":"Possible shipping failures (app + pipeline errors)","columns":["@timestamp","service","message"],"sort":[["@timestamp","desc"]],"kibanaSavedObjectMeta":{"searchSourceJSON":"{\"query\":{\"query\":\"level: (error OR warn) OR message: *error* OR message: *failed*\",\"language\":\"kuery\"},\"filter\":[],\"indexRefName\":\"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index\"}"}}}]
